description: Dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse are also called Chucks and come in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse was initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into a hot casual footwear favourite. This pair comes with a pair of additional laces in contrast colour to help you change your style statement with your outfitUpperCanvas upper for easy maintenance and durabilityHigh ankle for a snug, comfort Fit and to protect the upper ankleCarbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug fitSynthetic twill lace running through metallic eyelets for durability and snug fitAdditional lace in contrast colourMidsoleComfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioningReinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durabilityOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionDiamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrainsShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
